mapper.select: SELECT team_id FROM team_member WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM team ORDER BY name, id
SELECT u.* FROM app_user u JOIN team_member tm ON tm.user_id = u.id WHERE tm.team_id = #{teamId} ORDER BY u.emp
mapper.update: UPDATE team SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM team_member WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM space WHERE team_id = #{teamId}
